name: Pepe in Grani
teaser: It might just be my favorite dough. Pillowy, cloud-like, heavenly pizza made with the best ingredients possible.
review: I don't think it's my favorite pizza in the world, but it might just be my favorite dough. I often hear "pillowy" used to describe crust, but this is the first pie that earned that moniker for me. Pillowy, cloud-like, heavenly pizza made with the best ingredients you could possibly get for the job.
headsUp: Book well in advance. It is remote but worth every mile.
update: Still worth the trip to Caiazzo. Best dough I have ever encountered.
address: Vicolo S. Giovanni Battista, 3, 81013 Caiazzo CE, Italy
hours: Monday: Closed · Tuesday: 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM · Wednesday: 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM · Thursday: 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM · Friday: 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM · Saturday: 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM · Sunday: 12:30 – 2:30 PM, 6:30 PM – 12:30 AM
